mapper.select:
SELECT id, capability_code, capability_name, capability_type, parent_code, standard_dept_code, aliases_json, gender_rule, age_min, age_max, crowd_tags_json, pathway_tags_json, active_status, create_time, update_time FROM medical_capability_catalog
AND capability_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY capability_name ASC
